PowerShell($env:Path = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','Machine'\) + ';' + [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','User'\); $sp = "C:\\Users\\gianc\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\C--Users-gianc-Desktop-Progetto-sito-curriculum\\16003bbb-2117-4d40-a91c-244d57f0a8c6\\scratchpad"; node "scripts\\shot.mjs" "$sp\\salto.png" "\(async\(\)=>{ document.querySelector\('#welcome-btn'\).click\(\); __dbg.player.position.set\(0,0,6\); __dbg.tryJump\(\); const y1 = await new Promise\(r=>setTimeout\(\(\)=>r\(__dbg.player.position.y\),250\)\); const inAria = !__dbg.grounded; const yTerra = await new Promise\(r=>setTimeout\(\(\)=>r\(__dbg.player.position.y\),700\)\); setTimeout\(\(\)=>__dbg.tryJump\(\), 550\); return { yMetaSalto:+y1.toFixed\(2\), inAria, atterrato: yTerra===0 && __dbg.grounded } }\)\(\)")

PowerShell($env:Path = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','Machine'\) + ';' + [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','User'\); $sp = "C:\\Users\\gianc\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\C--Users-gianc-Desktop-Progetto-sito-curriculum\\16003bbb-2117-4d40-a91c-244d57f0a8c6\\scratchpad"; node "scripts\\shot.mjs" "$sp\\mobile.png" "\(async\(\)=>{ document.querySelector\('#welcome-btn'\).click\(\); document.body.classList.add\('touch'\); const d = getComputedStyle\(document.querySelector\('#jump-btn-mobile'\)\).display; let salta=false; document.querySelector\('#jump-btn-mobile'\).dispatchEvent\(new PointerEvent\('pointerdown',{bubbles:true}\)\); await new Promise\(r=>setTimeout\(r,150\)\); salta = !__dbg.grounded; return { pulsanteVisibile: d, saltaAlTocco: salta } }\)\(\)")
